strengths: ~17 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum experience bar
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform still in use), early-stage startup experience across multiple geographies
Current AI-adjacent work at re:cinq includes MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, showing willingness to move into the AI tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and tooling-level (started April 2025) — no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale, and no external recognition as an AI authority
Zero evidence of cloud or AI strategy advisory work; the role requires advising strategic enterprise customers and partners on AI adoption at a senior level
Operating as Staff/Senior Developer, not at the director-level IC or thought-leadership tier the role demands — no board-level visibility, keynotes, or published AI research
response.justification: Bogdan is a competent, versatile senior engineer with a real entrepreneurial streak and a healthy breadth of systems experience, but this role is hiring a recognized AI thought leader who can advise Fortune-500 customers, shape cloud product roadmaps, and inspire industry audiences — none of which appear in the resume. His AI exposure is too recent and too narrow (MCP tooling), he has no graduate AI credential, no cloud strategy background, and no history operating at the director-level influence this position requires. The gap is structural, not incremental.
